what a show-up is.<|26.60|> <|startoftranscript|><|en|><|transcribe|><|0.00|> When the police present a witness or a victim of a crime,<|6.74|> <|7.18|> not with a lineup where they can pick from the is this one person, is that who did it?<|27.60|> <|startoftranscript|><|en|><|transcribe|><|0.00|> And unsurprisingly, all objective research shows that this practice aggravates racial bias and, for
